corrections.text: The article attributes a direct quote to security researcher Will Dormann: "the exploit works reliably on Windows 11 systems running the May 2026 cumulative updates, producing a cmd.exe prompt with full SYSTEM privileges." The cited source (zero-day-wire-1.ghost.io) presents this as third-person reported speech, not a direct quote from Dormann. Dormann's actual words, sourced from his Mastodon post via The Hacker News, described the exploit as working "reliably" to open a "cmd.exe" prompt — the substance is correct but the phrasing was paraphrased. The quote marks should have enclosed Dormann's actual words.
